title: aquilegia vulgaris var. genuina
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris var. genuina, commonly known as the common columbine, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have medicinal benefits in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris var. genuina include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
